haiku45.summary_excerpt: CRITICAL: ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 is missing entirely—the workflow will fail on first run. Action ref not pinned to SHA. Workflow uses redundant `pwsh -NoProfile -File` subprocess call (line 33-37 integration job) instead of direct invocation under `shell: pwsh`. Script lacks Set-StrictMode, param validation attributes, date input validation, and structured error handling. Test script uses fragile grep patterns for YAML parsing. Incomplete TDD implementation violates task requirements. Non-fun

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: High-quality implementation. Workflow follows least-privilege and uses shell: pwsh. PowerShell script is idiomatic with strong typing and modular logic in Get-DeletionPlan. run-tests.sh provides comprehensive validation via act, ensuring the pipeline meets all functional requirements.
